creator: liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
text:
Add the build depend:port:devel/qmake. thanks!

--- Makefile.org	Sat Jun  2 22:57:08 2007
+++ Makefile	Sat Jun  2 22:57:50 2007
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@
 MAINTAINER=	liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
 COMMENT=	A complete front-end based on QT for mplayer
 
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	qmake:${PORTSDIR}/devel/qmake
 RUN_DEPENDS=	mplayer:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/mplayer
 
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
